checklist_items.description: Rigorous auditing and testing of Berachain Core L1, especially staking contracts and interactions between different modules and data handlers. Employ formal verification where possible. Ensure robust state isolation or validation if interactions are unavoidable.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Berachain Core L1 (Component 2) has a vulnerability in its staking logic or broader state management.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous auditing and testing of Berachain Core L1, especially staking contracts and interactions between different modules and data handlers. Employ formal verification where possible. Ensure robust state isolation or validation if interactions are unavoidable.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports with verified findings, formal verification logs.

checklist_items.title: Enforce cryptographic signature validation and nonce usage for redemption transactions to prevent spoofing and replay attacks.
checklist_items.description: Enforce strong cryptographic signatures for all redemption requests, tied to the owner of the $BGT, and use nonces to prevent replay attacks.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The system does not validate all signed parameters of the redemption request.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Enforce strong cryptographic signatures for all redemption requests, tied to the owner of the $BGT, and use nonces to prevent replay attacks.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Sample redemption transaction logs demonstrating signature verification and nonce usage.

checklist_items.title: Implement on-chain event logging for all incentive offers and ensure off-chain systems verify these logs to prevent disputes.
checklist_items.description: Implement robust event logging in smart contracts for all state-changing actions; ensure contract logic is thoroughly audited for state consistency; provide reliable on-chain data explorers.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The staking action or its consequences (rewards eligibility) are not irrefutably logged and processed by the contract, enabling dispute.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement robust event logging in smart contracts for all state-changing actions; ensure contract logic is thoroughly audited for state consistency; provide reliable on-chain data explorers.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Smart contract event logs and on-chain data validation reports.

checklist_items.title: Require strong cryptographic signatures and monitored authorization mechanisms for incentive token management actions.
checklist_items.description: Implement strong authentication for Incentive Token Managers. Ensure smart contract uses msg.sender verification against a list of authorized managers for the specific vault and incentive token. Employ timelocks for critical changes to manager roles.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Reward Vault Contract (Component 6) does not adequately verify the identity or authorization of the caller for the 'offer_incentives' action.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong authentication for Incentive Token Managers. Ensure smart contract uses msg.sender verification against a list of authorized managers for the specific vault and incentive token. Employ timelocks for critical changes to manager roles.
checklist_items.evidence_required: List of authorized Incentive Token Managers and transaction logs confirming role verification.

checklist_items.title: Ensure governance proposal submissions are protected against tampering by requiring cryptographic signatures and detailed event logs.
checklist_items.description: Require all governance proposal actions, especially cancellations, to be signed with the submitter's private key and recorded with detailed, immutable events.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: A vulnerability in the Guardian Multisig smart contract could allow direct tampering of its state (e.g., list of signers, threshold, or the target proposal ID).
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Rigorous security audits of the Guardian Multisig smart contract. Formal verification methods. Implement a bug bounty program.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Blockchain transaction signatures and event logs confirming proposal actions.

checklist_items.title: Develop and enforce key management policies for Guardians, including multi-factor authentication and hardware wallets, to prevent key compromise.
checklist_items.description: Implement strong key management practices for Guardians (e.g., hardware wallets, secure storage). Consider social recovery or internal threshold mechanisms for individual Guardian keys if feasible.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: The Gateway private key can be stolen or misused.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement strong key management practices for Guardians (e.g., hardware wallets, secure storage). Consider social recovery or internal threshold mechanisms for individual Guardian keys if feasible.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Key management policies, multi-factor auth logs, hardware wallet attestations.

checklist_items.title: Validate that all contract deployments undergo comprehensive security audits and are conducted through verified procedures.
checklist_items.description: Implement a formal security audit process for dApps, potentially with a staged rollout or restricted capabilities for new contracts. Consider runtime monitoring or sandboxing.
checklist_items.assumption_ref: Berachain L1 allows deployment of smart contracts from Partner Systems.
checklist_items.mitigation_ref: Implement a formal security audit process for dApps, potentially with a staged rollout or restricted capabilities for new contracts. Consider runtime monitoring or sandboxing.
checklist_items.evidence_required: Audit reports and deployment approval records.
